name: What's the biggest mistake after warehouse injury?
description: Delay reporting or solo insurer talks.[1]

mainEntity.name: What's the biggest mistake after warehouse injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: Delay reporting or solo insurer talks.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Not reporting immediately or talking to adjuster without lawyer - leads to denials/low offers.**[1][4] Key factors: delay loses evidence; admissions hurt. Write report, photo site, seek care. Lawyer prevents pitfalls; free consult. Avoid rushing settlement.[10]
